stemHtml: In the proximity of the polar jet stream, where do wind shear and clear air turbulence (CAT) occur?

options.a: In units of kt/1000 ft, horizontal wind shears near the jet stream are larger than vertical wind shears.
options.b: The largest vertical wind shears are found at the jet stream core.
options.c: Most CAT areas are found on the cyclonic side of the jet stream.
options.d: CAT is generated by horizontal wind shear only.
